title: Experimental Ebola Trial Begins in Congo as Death Toll Tops 500 - Bloomberg.com
summary_full: Experimental Ebola Trial Begins in Congo as Death Toll Tops 500  Bloomberg.comThe race for an Ebola therapy begins  STATPatient enrolment begins in a scientific trial to identify the first effective treatments for Bundibugyo virus disease  World Health Organization (WHO)Ebola treatment trial begins in Congo as outbreak continues to grow  ABC News & Headlines – Australian Broadcasting CorporationTrial for Bundibugyo Ebola treatment starts in DRC, WHO says  Reuters
